headline: Shares of travel and leisure companies are trading higher after President Trump's social media post indicated that the U.S. will work closely with Iran, and the countries have already agreed to several key points in the proposed conflict-resolution plan. Yesterday's two-week ceasefire agreement and easing oil prices support a warm industry outlook.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Las Vegas Sands, Raises Price Target to $67
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Stephen Grambling   maintains Las Vegas Sands (NYSE:LVS) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $66 to $67.
